title: Service Analyzer
description: Service Analyzer is the ITSI UI home page. It displays service and KPI health scores that are trending at top severity levels. You can configure Service Analyzer to filter the display of services and KPIs relevant to the user. The Service Analyzer object is called `home_view`.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: Unique ID for the entry in KV store.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: home_view

attributes.name: -owner
attributes.label: -owner
attributes.description: User that creates the saved service analyzer.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: User given title for the service analyzer.

attributes.name: earliest_time
attributes.label: earliest_time
attributes.description: Earliest time for the searches.

attributes.name: latest_time
attributes.label: latest_time
attributes.description: Latest time for the searches.

attributes.name: serviceWhitelist
attributes.label: serviceWhitelist
attributes.description: List of filtered services.

attributes.name: kpiWhitelist
attributes.label: kpiWhitelist
attributes.description: List of filtered kpis.

attributes.name: isServiceFilterEnabled
attributes.label: isServiceFilterEnabled
attributes.description: True if services are filtered, false by default.

attributes.name: isKpiFilterEnabled
attributes.label: isKpiFilterEnabled
attributes.description: True if kpis are filtered, false by default.

attributes.name: serviceTilesSettings
attributes.label: serviceTilesSettings
attributes.description: SeverityTilesSettingModel with number of kpi tiles and filter.

attributes.name: view
attributes.label: view
attributes.description: Determines if service analyzer view is standard or full screen. Standard is default.

attributes.name: isDefault
attributes.label: isDefault
attributes.description: True if it is the default (standard) service analyzer, false otherwise.

attributes.name: titleSize
attributes.label: titleSize
attributes.description: medium\|large\], large by default.

attributes.name: searchType
attributes.label: searchType
attributes.description: maxseverity\] \[aggregate\|maxseverity\] aggregate shows the most recent service value and the max severity is service value unless there is an entity value with worst severity.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
